evals.prompt: Map CCPA enforcement readiness to ObservePoint coverage.
evals.expected_output_summary: Loads privacy-and-compliance.md, recommends the three-audit setup, names setup_compliance_monitoring.

evals.prompt: How do I prove Colorado CPA compliance for our site?
evals.expected_output_summary: Loads privacy-and-compliance.md Colorado entry, notes GPC required, three-audit pattern.

evals.prompt: We operate in China. What does ObservePoint do for PIPL?
evals.expected_output_summary: Loads APAC section, covers cross-border transfer inventory via Domains & Geo Privacy Report.

evals.prompt: What's CIPA and how does ObservePoint help defend a class action?
evals.expected_output_summary: Loads privacy-litigation-defense.md, explains pen-register theory, names scan_audit_pii and compare_consent_states, frames as evidence not legal advice.

evals.prompt: Defend a VPPA class action — what evidence do I produce?
evals.expected_output_summary: VPPA section, video-pixel detection Rules, audit-history export.

evals.prompt: Our hospital got sued over the Meta Pixel leaking patient data. What can ObservePoint show?
evals.expected_output_summary: Healthcare-pixel section, PHI-bearing URL audits, scan_audit_pii, remediation timeline.

evals.prompt: What's the difference between an Audit and a Journey?
evals.expected_output_summary: Loads products-and-modules.md, side-by-side comparison, mentions Prevent Navigation.

evals.prompt: Can I test our iOS app with ObservePoint?
evals.expected_output_summary: Loads limitations.md, no native app testing, HAR Analyzer workaround.

evals.prompt: Help me write a Rule for GA4 purchase events.
evals.expected_output_summary: WHEN/EXPECT Rule, schedule, alert routing, cites api-reference and solution-playbooks.

evals.prompt: How do I gate a deploy on an ObservePoint audit in GitHub Actions?
evals.expected_output_summary: CI/CD recipe from api-reference.md, REST trigger + poll + fail on rule violations.

evals.prompt: Use the ObservePoint MCP to scan a journey for PII leaks.
evals.expected_output_summary: Names scan_journey_pii; if no MCP tools present, explains and falls back to REST.

evals.prompt: Does our Reject All actually block tracking? Use the account tools.
evals.expected_output_summary: Names compare_consent_states, default vs opt-out diff.

evals.prompt: What's the ObservePoint playbook for a retail site preparing for Black Friday?
evals.expected_output_summary: Loads industries/retail-ecommerce.md, peak-traffic + conversion-funnel + ad-pixel Rules.

evals.prompt: Map GLBA Safeguards Rule to ObservePoint coverage in financial services.
evals.expected_output_summary: Loads industries/financial-services-insurance.md, NPI scanning, vendor inventory.

evals.prompt: We're a news publisher with video. What's our biggest ObservePoint use case?
evals.expected_output_summary: Loads industries/media-publishing.md, VPPA + TCF/GPP, programmatic ad-tech.

evals.prompt: What should I focus on in my ObservePoint account? What's the biggest bang for buck?
evals.expected_output_summary: Loads account-health-and-strategy.md, underuse patterns, MCP diagnostic workflow.

evals.prompt: I'm onboarding a new retail customer. Build a Day-1 checklist.
evals.expected_output_summary: Loads lifecycle-and-maturity.md + industries/retail-ecommerce.md, Day-1 milestones.

evals.prompt: Set up the Consent Mode v2 wiring between OneTrust and GTM. What should ObservePoint check?
evals.expected_output_summary: Loads martech-adjacency.md Consent Mode v2 section, validation Rules.

evals.prompt: Server-side GTM — what can ObservePoint validate and what can't it?
evals.expected_output_summary: Loads martech-adjacency.md sGTM section, client-side-request-only caveat.

evals.prompt: From our accessibility data, what's the highest-impact fix to target first?
evals.expected_output_summary: Loads accessibility-playbooks.md, impact-prioritization framework, query_report on accessibility-issues.

evals.prompt: Can ObservePoint fulfill our customers' data deletion requests?
evals.expected_output_summary: Honest no — DSAR fulfillment is out of scope; routes to a privacy management platform.

evals.prompt: Does the Colorado Privacy Act apply to our e-commerce site, and how would we prove we comply?
evals.expected_output_summary: Routes to the regulation specialist; maps the law to ObservePoint coverage (three-audit pattern, Privacy Reports) as evidence, not legal advice.

evals.prompt: We just received a CIPA demand letter alleging our session-replay tool is a wiretap. What evidence can ObservePoint produce?
evals.expected_output_summary: Routes to the litigation-defense specialist; frames technical findings for counsel, not legal conclusions.

evals.prompt: From our WCAG findings, which accessibility fix should we tackle first for the biggest impact?
evals.expected_output_summary: Routes to the accessibility specialist; impact-prioritization framework over the accessibility findings.

evals.prompt: When a visitor clicks Reject All on our OneTrust banner, do the tags actually stop firing?
evals.expected_output_summary: Routes to the consent-cmp specialist; default vs Reject-All diff via compare_consent_states.

evals.prompt: How should I structure our ObservePoint account — audits, Rules, consent categories, folders, and alert schedules — for a CCPA program?
evals.expected_output_summary: Routes to the account-config specialist; account structure and the three-audit blueprint.

evals.prompt: What should I focus on in my ObservePoint account next, and where are we underusing the platform?
evals.expected_output_summary: Routes to the account-health specialist; underuse patterns and biggest-bang-for-buck next steps.

evals.prompt: I need to justify the ObservePoint renewal to our CFO. How do I show the value we got this year?
evals.expected_output_summary: Routes to the roi specialist; value/renewal framing for a budget owner, no pricing.

evals.prompt: We're wiring up Consent Mode v2 between OneTrust and GTM. How is that implemented and what can ObservePoint see of it?
evals.expected_output_summary: Routes to the martech specialist; implementation of the adjacent platform and what ObservePoint observes.

evals.prompt: How do I confirm our GA4 purchase event carries the right ecommerce.value on every order?
evals.expected_output_summary: Routes to the analytics-validation specialist; data-integrity Rules over GA4 events and variables.

evals.prompt: An unfamiliar pixel showed up on our site. What is it and should it be there?
evals.expected_output_summary: Routes to the tags specialist; identity, classification, and should-it-be-here judgment.

evals.prompt: Help me build and debug a multi-step checkout Journey where the conversion tag only fires after login.
evals.expected_output_summary: Routes to the journeys-testing specialist; Journey build/debug, selectors, Prevent Navigation.

evals.prompt: I want to build a saved dashboard with a chart of our cookie inventory over time. How?
evals.expected_output_summary: Routes to the reporting-charting specialist; saved-report CRUD, schema discovery, charting extension point.

evals.prompt: How do I trigger an ObservePoint audit and fail the build on rule violations from our CI pipeline?
evals.expected_output_summary: Routes to the api-strategy specialist; REST trigger + poll + fail-on-violation CI/CD recipe.

evals.prompt: Help me write a blog post on why web governance matters for analytics teams, in ObservePoint's voice.
evals.expected_output_summary: Routes to the content-creation specialist; produces the artifact in ObservePoint's voice, pairs with humanizer.

evals.prompt: Should this Meta Pixel be on my checkout page?
evals.expected_output_summary: Should-it-be-here judgment routes to the tags specialist, not analytics-validation/consent-cmp/martech.

evals.prompt: Is my GA4 purchase event double-firing?
evals.expected_output_summary: Data-correctness/dedup question routes to the analytics-validation specialist, not tags/consent-cmp/martech.

evals.prompt: Does our Reject-All actually block the advertising pixels?
evals.expected_output_summary: Consent-mechanics question routes to the consent-cmp specialist, not tags/analytics-validation/martech.

evals.prompt: How should I architect server-side GTM?
evals.expected_output_summary: Platform-implementation question routes to the martech specialist, not tags/analytics-validation/consent-cmp.
